mapper.sql: SELECT id, project_id, replay_id, session_id, page_id, app_name, app_version, `release`, environment, user_id, device_id, initial_url, title, started_at, last_seen_at, chunk_count, event_count, create_time, update_time FROM monitor_replay_session
mapper.update: UPDATE monitor_replay_session SET page_id = #{pageId}, app_name = #{appName}, app_version = #{appVersion}, `release` = #{release}, environment = #{environment}, user_id = #{userId}, device_id = #{deviceId}, initial_url = #{initialUrl}, title = #{title}, started_at = #{startedAt}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, event_count = #{eventCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, replay_session_id, sequence_no, started_at, ended_at, event_count, payload_json, create_time FROM monitor_replay_chunk WHERE replay_session_id = #{replaySessionId} ORDER BY sequence_no ASC
